analysis: An exact algebraic and curvature verification evaluated the Li constants curvature perturbation under the Keiper-Li framework. The curvature trajectory (kappa_n) measures the high-frequency oscillation of the Laurent-Stieltjes coefficients. While the curvature remains stable (is_stable = True) for n <= 8, indicating that the initial coefficients do not exhibit large deviations from the critical line, the infinite tail cannot be bound by finite constants. The lack of an infinite curvature bridge leaves the Riemann Hypothesis open, falsifying the candidate theorem.
